metadata.name: Transfer Funds in a Variable Annuity

description: A variable annuity holder wants to move money from a bond subaccount to an equity subaccount.

nodes.task_description: Identify the contract holder and their investment subaccounts.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the customer and their current fund allocation.

nodes.task_description: Take the client's instructions for the fund transfer (amount, from/to subaccounts).

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately records the transfer request.
Agent successfully executes the transfer between the internal funds.
